evidence.recall-check-log: New returns and flagged SKUs checked against CPSC recall list.
evidence.age-warning-label-check: Age grading, choking warnings, battery warnings, and magnet labels reviewed.
evidence.damaged-packaging-log: Opened and damaged items moved to manager review bin.
evidence.display-and-floor-safety-check: Displays, aisles, demo toys, and loose parts checked.
evidence.cash-reconciliation: Register, refunds, gift cards, and deposit match.
evidence.restricted-access-stock-check: High-value stock, batteries, magnets, and backroom secured.
